gist.headline: Justice in the Hive
gist.blurb: AutoTutela has joined the chat! A new AI assistant to help Colombian citizens draft legal protection documents for their fundamental rights.
gist.summary: Added AutoTutela, an AI-powered legal assistant for drafting Colombian 'Acciones de Tutela', to the platform's app ecosystem.
gist.impact: Users can now generate formal legal documents to protect their fundamental rights in Colombia directly through the chat interface.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy legal office scene. The bee mascot is dressed as a tiny lawyer with a tie and reading glasses, reviewing a document. A pixelated scale of justice sits on a wooden desk. The background suggests a warm library with books.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the bee mascot wearing a tiny tie and glasses, reviewing a document on a desk with a pixelated scale of justice. Lime green (#ecf874) and warm wood-tone background. Soft lighting, library vibes. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
